title: Wetland Loss Detection And Migratory Bird Population Impact
summary: Build a verified workflow for detecting wetland loss and estimating migratory bird population impact using satellite-derived wetland maps and bird-count data.
why_it_matters: Build a verified workflow for detecting wetland loss and estimating migratory bird population impact using satellite-derived wetland maps and bird-count data.

success_metrics.target: Every claim links dated evidence with methodology.

review_policy.merge_gate: Schema validation, domain review, safety review, replication.
